name: flato-design-mcp-codex
description: Connect Codex to Flato Design MCP and guide reliable editing of Flato's editable design canvas.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codex to create, inspect, revise, export, and QA editable Flato designs.
interface.longDescription: Installs the Flato Design MCP server configuration and a workflow skill that teaches Codex how to authorize Flato, choose a project, read design context, use explicit page and block ids, apply edits, inspect MCP feedback, and verify rendered output.
defaultPrompt: Use Flato Design MCP to inspect and edit this design.
Create a new editable Flato design through MCP.
Revise the selected Flato block safely.
